#Text=back to the streets where we began
#Text="Alright see you tomorrow?"
#Text="Duh."
#Text=He hangs up, tossing his phone into his bag.
#Text=He watches as other commuters rush about, tugging onto their bags and other items.
#Text=He sat near the gate, bored out of his mind.
#Text=He had a good 20 minutes to spare and he already tried to waste the 20 minutes before eating slowly.
#Text=He picks his phone back up after it dinged, frowning at who had texted him.
#Text=It was Bobby, out of all people.
#Text=He had come in when the team was out on a call, saving him some odd looks.
#Text=All he wanted to do was to drop off his resignation paperwork and bolt off, not wanting to be confronted by Bobby.
#Text=If you're asking yourself,
#Text=where would he go?
#Text=Well, I got an answer for you.
#Text=He has a family who cares for him even after being away for almost 4 years ago after helping them to defeat Amara.
#Text=The family was known as the infamous Winchester among every hunter in America and possibly worldwide.
#Text=How you ask?
#Text=Well, it's simple, they almost ended the world 5 times.
#Text=Buck had missed them dearly, the brothers the most.
#Text=They had practically grown up together alongside his sister.
#Text=Bobby singer, the brother's pseudo-dad, had taken them in when he was 10.
#Text=He's eternally grateful for him, wanting to repay him in every way possible but sadly, he died to a bullet in his head by a leviathan.
#Text=But he heard that an alternate universe Bobby singer had appeared.
#Text=Buck had a lot of questions to ask.
#Text="Flight from Los Angeles to Kansas has arrived.

column1: #Text=The staff asked kindly, as she did for the many passengers before him.
#Text=He handed her his ticket, trying to not make it awkward by having eye contact so he just stares down onto the counter.
#Text=She rips a part of the ticket and hands it back to him.
#Text=He takes it and walks off, eager to be on the plane back.
#Text="Dear
#Text=Passengers
#Text=,
#Text=this is your captain speaking..."
#Text=Buck groans as his eyes slowly flutter open, looking around.
#Text=The little screen on the back of the seat in front of him showed the time.
#Text=It was mid-day and Buck was extremely hungry he could eat a triple cheeseburger, obviously pushing the craving aside after remembering how unhealthy it is.
#Text=The planes land and the first thing he did was switch off airplane mode.
#Text=He never knew why he had to do it but he rather be safe than sorry.
#Text=Text and calls came flooding in among the other useless notification.
#Text=Most of them were from the team but one was from Sam.
#Text=He misses the younger Winchester.
#Text=They would spend nights up reading on lore and mythology until one of them passes out from exhaustion.
#Text=He smiles to himself, typing in a quick reply before shoving it back into his pocket to get off the plane.
#Text=He plans to either leave the team on reading or ignore them forever, both seeing like excellent options to the blonde.
#Text=He wanted badly to reply back to Eddie and tell him he's sorry but he doesn't deserve it since he had basically shut him out, even after the lawsuit.
#Text="There he is.
#Text=Dean blew a whistle, eyeing him up and down.
#Text="Dean."
#Text=The taller one warns.
#Text="Hey man."
#Text=Sam greets, pulling him to a manly hug.
#Text=Dean did the same, patting him on the back while hugging him.
#Text=Dean was the polar opposite of Sam.
#Text=Lives of junk food, not a book lover, will eat as much pie as he wants but they were thick as thieves.
#Text=Having each other backs 24/7.
#Text=It made him remember Eddie, who was now probably doing something fun with Christopher.
#Text=Christopher, he smiles as he thinks about the happiest kid in the world.
#Text=He misses the kid like hell and would risk everything to see him but he's too much of a coward to face Eddie. he felt horrible for leaving him but he had no choice.

#Text=The impala rumbling slowly comes to a halt, stopping inside a garage full of vintage cars Buck would love to take out for a spin although they most likely won't have an airbag and getting into an accident would most likely be fatal.
#Text="Here we are.
#Text=Castiel stood up as they walk into the room.
#Text=He immediately goes to Dean's side and gives him a peck on his cheeks.
#Text=Even after being here for less than 5 minutes, he already ships it.
#Text="Guys."
#Text=Sam rolls his eyes, obviously tired of the pair.
#Text=He had heard mention of their friends living with them but if you ask him, he couldn't tell who was who.
#Text="Hi, I'm Jack!"
#Text=The kid who was playing a game spoke up, tossing the phone onto the table.
#Text="Buck."
#Text=He greets, feeling awkward.
#Text=He didn't like the introduction, he feels that they were too forced.
#Text="It's good to see you, Buck."
#Text=Castiel pulls away from Dean who pouted and nods his head.
#Text="I see that you and Dean had finally gotten your head out of your asses and fucked, "Buck smirks.
#Text=Sam snorts, Dean blush but look like he could kill Buck.
#Text=Castiel tilts his head in confusion.
#Text="I and Dean have not participated in any form of sexual intemi-"Castiel asks innocently which Buck had dearly missed.
#Text=Even after being on earth for more than a decade, he still gets confused by the human thing.
#Text="Cas."
#Text=Dean cuts him off, trying to save them both the embarrassment.
#Text="I was just confused."
#Text=Castiel pouted.
#Text="I know babe but he was just joking, "Dean reassures.
#Text="Cas and Jack will show you your room.
#Text=look which he just shrugs off.
#Text="Is firefighting fun?"
#Text=Jack asked innocent touch to it.
#Text=He hadn't fallen in love with the kid as he had with the firefam's kids and he wasn't sorry.
#Text="Yeah but it's also risky," Buck replies as the trio makes their way down the hallway, passing multiple doors.
#Text="Hunting is also risky I don't see why you would want to come back to this."
#Text=Castiel looks at him worriedly.
#Text="At least I have a choice of when I want to be risky.

column1: #Text=He mutters.
#Text=but he had nothing left to sell them
#Text=Chapter Summary
#Text=Buck's first case back into the hunting life.
#Text=Chapter Notes

#Text=I actually wanted to use the current storyline about Chuck but decided against it because I'll feel like I'm spoiling it for others so I decided to use s14 one :) Expect for the fact that Jack was soulless and/or dying.
#Text=also crowley's alive but rowena is the queen of hell :)
#Text=thanks for the kudos !
#Text="So first case back huh?"
#Text=Dean comments over the loud blasting of AC/DC that Buck clearly remembered.
#Text=Sam rode shotgun while Castiel and Buck sat in the back.
#Text=Jack had stayed back to hang out with his new friends.
#Text="Yeah, I might be rusty though."
#Text=Buck laughs dryly, trying to find comfort in the cramped space behind since Sam has pushed the seat back way too far for his liking, damn those long legs.
#Text="So what's up Sam," Dean asked, looking over to his baby brother.
#Text="Alright so get this, those vamps we're searching for, they move around a lot.
#Text=Buck asked, already getting into the feel of things.
#Text=He loves hunting.
#Text=He loves chopping off the monster's head and reciting the exorcism to blast, as Dean would put in, those black-eyed son of bitches away.
#Text="To gather up a new pack or something.
#Text=Buck asked.
#Text=He had never heard of a Eileen despite keeping contact with the boys since he left for L.A.
#Text="Sam's girlfriend."
#Text=Dean jokes, nudging Sam.
#Text="She's not my- Dean!"
#Text=Sam complains.
#Text=Buck knew what was coming, the typical brotherly banter he has grown to get used to.
#Text="I definitely did not miss this," Buck whispers to Castiel who was staring out the window.
#Text=Castiel sighs, "It's something I got used to."
#Text="And the uncomfortable seat.
#Text=Buck scoffs.
#Text=He lets his mind wander free at the car finally settle into a comfortable silence.
#Text=Sam continues to wander the internet as Dean softly hums the tunes on the radio.
#Text=Castiel goes back to staring out the window.
#Text=He wonders how the 118 and Maddie are doing.
#Text=He misses them dearly but he can't stand to be in the same room as them.
#Text=All they do is shut him out or get yelled at like at the supermarket or the rage room.
#Text=He loves Carla, Athena, Christopher and the rest of the kids, May and Micheal.
#Text=He even thinks about Bosko.
#Text=Lena Bosko, the woman he thought he would actually hate but actually grew fond of.
#Text=Lena has helped him try to get the team to talk to him but failed, however, Buck doesn't blame her for that.
#Text=Lena was the one who told Buck when they were out on a call so that Buck could pop in and drop the papers off.
#Text=Athena, god he hates making her worried.
#Text=If he ever sees the women again he'll be running, he doesn't want his head chopped off.
#Text=The only person he told was Maddie.
#Text=Maddie knew the brothers and what hunting was to the Buckley siblings.
#Text=She knew the existence of monsters and whatever goes bump in the night.
#Text=She was a badass hunter, even Bobby had compared her to the boys' mom, Mary Winchester.
#Text=God, he misses them dearly.
#Text=A part of him just wants to run back to L.A. and apologize.
#Text=But a greater part of him just wants him to stay and never go back.
#Text=He met a lot of wonderful people during his time in L.A. but that was over for the younger Buckley.
#Text="Alright, we'll rest up before we move off first thing in the morning, "Dean announced, shutting off the ignition of the impala.
#Text=Buck tossed his duffle bag onto his shoulder before stepping out, leaving the door open for Castiel.
#Text=He missed this.
#Text=Crappy motel room, long road trips across the country, having little to no sleep.
#Text=The classic hunter life.
#Text=Even though he left for good reasons but it was nice to come back to it for a break.
#Text=Sam followed Buck to their room since Dean had pulled Castiel away from them once they received the keys.
#Text=Buck used to bunk with Castiel before Dean and Castiel got together.
#Text=They would spend time talking about everything and nothing or Castiel helping him in his homework.
#Text="I wonder what kind of roommate you'll be."
#Text=Buck jokes as he unlocks the door.
#Text=The scent of the motel room filled his nose, making his face scrunch up in disgust.
#Text=He got too comfortable in his own home that he has forgotten what motel room smelt like.
#Text="I'm a great roommate."
#Text=Sam rolls his eyes, following the blonde into the room.
#Text="Hm sure," Buck muttered as he drops onto the bed, letting it pull him in like quicksand.
#Text="Dude go shower."
#Text=Sam makes a disgusted face at Buck who only laughs.
#Text="Already did before we left,"Buck smirks, only sitting up to take off his jacket.
#Text="Whatever."
#Text=Sam huffed, walking away.
#Text=Meanwhile back in L.A
#Text=.
#Text="It's been two days where's Buck?"
#Text=Eddie asks, face going red from all the pent up anger.
#Text=He needs to punch something, kick something.
#Text="He quit."
#Text=Bobby sighs from the kitchen as he moves around a spatula.
#Text="What?"
#Text=Eddie said in disbelief, Buck had left?
#Text=How.
#Text=Why.
#Text=When.
#Text=What?
#Text=Hen and Chim's shock look was a clear indication that neither of them knew either.
#Text=He felt as all the anger turns into worry.
#Text=Why did he leave?
#Text="Chim?"
#Text=Eddie looks at him.
#Text=He should know, he's dating Buck's sister for heaven's sake!
#Text="I-I only know he went to Kansas that's all.

column3:
_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	

#Text=Bobby apologizes, But I couldn't believe it myself."

column1: #Text=Bobby looked like he was on the verge of tears.
#Text=Bobby felt as if he failed another child again.
#Text=He failed Buck.
#Text=Buck saw him as a father-figure and he failed him.
#Text=When he told Athena he cried for the night, he couldn't sleep a wink.
#Text=He wanted nothing more than to go to Kansas and search for him personally.
#Text=Back in Eddie's mind, it was racing like it was in a competition.
#Text=How was he going to tell Christopher, his son who loved the man very dearly that he was so close to calling him 'Pops'.
#Text=How was he going to tell a 10-year old that another parental figure in his life has left?
#Text=It was Shannon all over again and he hated it.
#Text=He could see Christopher's teary eyes and frown.
#Text="I mean, we haven't been the best of friends, "Hen muttered, aimlessly stirring her almost empty coffee mug.
#Text=This made Eddie think.
#Text=Hen was right.
#Text=Fuck, he was supposed to have Buck's back, even when it got bad.
#Text=Now Buck thinks that he can't trust him anymore and have left him for a group of strangers.
#Text=Chimney only lower his head, feeling all sort of embarrassment.
#Text=Buck was practically his brother in law and he let not only Maddie down but also him.
#Text=This whole thing is a mess.
#Text="Hey Siri, how far is away is Kansas from Los Angeles, "Hen asked.
#Text="The distance between Kansas and Los Angeles is 1,615.5 miles by car..."
#Text=·_·
#Text="Hey wake up."
#Text=Sam nudges Buck, who was still sleeping.
#Text=He was dead asleep, his mouth hung open and limbs sprawled out.
#Text="I already let you sleep in it's 10."
#Text=Sam sigh, tossing the comforter off Buck's body.
#Text="Mhm noo."
#Text=Buck groans, pulling the comforter up.
#Text="Ok, I'll eat up those waffles from Charles then."
#Text=Sam shrugs, trying to persuade him to wake up.
#Text=To Sam's luck, it was a success.
#Text="I'll go brush my teeth, do not touch those Waffles."
#Text=Buck points out threateningly.
#Text=Sam laughs, sitting down on the chair by the small table.
#Text=He sighed, wondering why he had come back.
#Text=He had thought Buck had left for good, finally found that apple pie life.
#Text=It's probably something bad if he had to come back, it's always something bad.
#Text=Cause that's just rediculously odd
#Text=Chapter Summary
#Text=They arrive in Austin,Texas.
#Text=Chapter Notes
#Text=I'm bored in biology class right now so, yeah.
#Text=thanks for the kudos!
#Text=See the end of the chapter for more
#Text=notes
#Text="What I can infer is that the vampires, who like to be called the Ricci family.
#Text="God I wish I had my Jeep.
#Text=Dean scoff.
#Text="Sorry," Sam muttered, rolling the seat front a little to make way for Buck's leg.
#Text=He sighs in relief, finally having space for his legs.
#Text=·_·
#Text="Go -punch- to -dodge- hell!"
#Text=Buck slides the razor-sharp machete across the Vamp's head, chopping it off clean.
#Text=The head falls to the floor with a thud.
#Text=God, he missed this the most; kicking monsters' ass.
#Text=Before Buck would even get to breathe, another one was coming after him from behind and had managed to land a good kick.
#Text=He fell back onto the hard wooden floor, his weapon knock off his hand.
#Text=He thrust his leg up and kick the Vamp in his shin, causing it to stumble backward, giving Buck enough leverage to retrieve his weapon.
#Text=Another clean slice and another head fall to the floor.
#Text=Buck gaze around the room, seeing heads and headless bodies all over the once clean, shiny floor.
#Text=Sam was in the other corner, panting as he loosely let go of his machete.
#Text=Castiel and Dean were huddled at the side of the room.
#Text=Castiel was fussing over his boyfriend, checking for any injuries or whatsoever.
#Text=He chuckles, wondering if they're already married.
#Text="Babe, Buck over there got a huge gash to his head.
#Text=Castiel offered, placing two fingers to his forehead.
#Text=He felt angelic grace rush in and out of him, it was something he still wasn't used to and probably never will.
#Text="Thanks, "Buck muttered, feeling his once bloody forehead was now clean of cuts.
#Text=His whole body is probably free of those too.
#Text="Alright, I need a beer stat, "Dean comments, letting out a long breath.
#Text="Amen brother."
#Text=·_·
#Text="Why are we even doing this?"
#Text=Maddie asks, for the millionth time today.
#Text="Because we're gonna bring him back home," Bobby states yet again.
#Text=It was a wonder how he hasn't lost his patience.
#Text="He grew up in Lawrence.
#Text=Bobby trails off, his eyes off the window of the plane.
#Text="I miss him."
#Text="We all do Bobby.

#Text=Her arguing wasn't going to make them turn back, hell they were already in Kansas' air.
#Text=·_·
#Text=Hey, it's Buck!

column1: #Text="Maddie?"
#Text=An entirely different but familiar voice spoke.
#Text="Sam?"
#Text=Maddie said in disbelief since when did Buck leaves his phone lying around.
#Text=The crew surrounding her look at her with concern about whoever the hell this 'Sam' is and who he is to Buck.
#Text="Yeah uh what's up?"
#Text=God the nervousness is still so evident in Sam's voice.
#Text="Is Buck there?"
#Text=She asks as she starts pacing around just outside of the airport.
#Text="Oh yeah, we're just heading back from Austin.
#Text=Worry had slowly faded from her voice and was replaced with relief.
#Text="No problem Mads, I'll text you the address."
#Text=Sam hung up, leaving the crew in confusion.
#Text=·_·
#Text="Uh, what's that?"
#Text=Chimney asks, pointing to a figure with glowing yellow eyes and claws.
#Text="Oh, shit"Maddie whispers, knowing immediately what it was.
#Text=She internally smacks herself, she brought them to danger.
#Text=She knew the risks of bringing bare civilians to a hunter's base.
#Text=The brothers were hunted by monsters, day to night to avenge their brothers and sisters.
#Text=And this time, it's a fricking werewolf and she felt that there were more.
#Text=She was correct, their car now surrounded by hungry wolves, all waiting to claw their hearts out and eat it.
#Text=shitshitshit.
#Text=Maddie dug around her purse, finding some sort of weapon so that they can defend themselves but they are no hope.
#Text=They were all gonna die and it was her fault.
#Text=So instead of finding a weapon, she found her phone.
#Text=She rang Buck.
#Text=Chapter End Notes
#Text=this was really dry im so sorry. :(
#Text=kudos are appreciated!
#Text=done my time and served my sentence
#Text=Chapter Summary
#Text=Sam, Dean and Castiel meets the crew.
#Text=Chapter Notes
#Text=It is now April first or happy april fools!
#Text=thanks for the kudos!
#Text=See the end of the chapter for more
#Text=notes
#Text=Time seems to tick by slowly, the rustling of leaves and heavy drops of rain grew louder as each second pass by.
#Text=It was exhausting, as so Maddie thought.
#Text=She remembers what happens before.
#Text=They got ambushed by a pack of hungry werewolves, all ready to chow down on their hearts but their leader stopped them.
#Text=The car they had rented, it was probably in scraps from all the scratches and the wolves taking it apart.
#Text=The engine was taken out, leaving behind a bundle of wires.
#Text="Here I was, thinking the Buckley siblings had left the world of hunting."
#Text=A wolf, who they discovered was named James Ricci, spoke with bitterness practically oozing.
#Text=His knuckles were bloody from the they had put up as they struggled to defend themselves in order to not die.
#Text="I wasn't hunting."
#Text=Maddie sneered, her hands moving frantically behind her back to try and loosen the strings before releasing she couldn't.
#Text=She felt her hand grow cold as the strings tighten in with each nudge, causing her blood to slowly stop flowing.
#Text="Not you.
#Text=Maddie laughs which got her slapped in the face.
#Text=She swore she saw Doug in James position but she reminded herself, Doug is dead.
#Text=She swiftly change her horrified front to a brave one.
#Text="You do not speak ill of my brother like that."
#Text=James sneered, his eyes full of rage.
#Text=His shoulders were tense as he paced around the room.
#Text="Ouch, you gonna cry?"
#Text=Maddie lookup in relief to a dark-haired man with unmistakeable several green eyes who was holding a pistol, most likely with some sliver ammunition.
#Text="Winchester," James smirked, a devilish grin plastered on his face.
#Text="What a nice surprise!"
#Text=How the hell is someone laughing and giggling like they won the lottery when a gun with bullets that could kill them was pointing straight to their brain.
#Text="Ricci.
#Text=James sneered, his fangs spiking out from his gums.
#Text="I don't have time for this."
#Text=Dean grimaced before pulling the trigger, sending a sliver bullets to his brain.
#Text=James fell to the floor with a thud, his eyes wide open and lifeless.
#Text="Hey c'mon, Sam and Cas found your friends.
#Text=Maddie breathes with relief, a long sigh escaping from her mouth.
#Text="Glad he's safe."
#Text=·_·
#Text="Damn what a place."
#Text=Hen commented, mouth agape.
#Text=She must've forgotten about the large wound on her arm as she looked around the room in awe.
#Text="You guys paid for this?"
#Text=Chim asks, who was also in awe.
#Text="Uh no.

column4: Sam and Dean's Grandfather[133]|Sam and Dean[134]

column1: #Text=Athena demanded, her eyes full of rage and confusion which was obviously directed to Buck.
#Text="Well uh it's a long story."
#Text=Buck awkwardly said, scratching the back of his neck.
#Text=He looked at the hunters and the angel who had already left the room.
#Text="We got all the time in the world kid."
#Text=Athena took a chair and sat down, her eyes trained on Buck.
#Text=The others follow suit, opting to grab a chair or just sit on the table.
#Text=·_·
#Text="Bean!"
#Text=Buck said with a huge grin on his face.
#Text="Hey buddy."
#Text=Dean let down his tough exterior and let the soft interior shine through.
#Text=He smiled at the 6 year old who they had just saved from some pesky demons just 2 years ago.
#Text=Even though he was basically 13 years older then the younger one.
#Text=Bobby, their uncle slash their father figure slash basically dad, had rescued Buck and his sister, Maddie.
#Text=Dean was skeptical as first about taking in some innocent kids but Sam was overjoyed.
#Text=He loves kid and would die for them.
#Text=Dean soon grow fond of the siblings and had started to teach them basic life skills like laundry, doing the dishes and some domestic stuff.
#Text=They were still young for the hunter crap and didn't want their sleep to be filled with nightmares about monsters.
#Text=The trio consisting of Bobby, Dean and Sam had come to a conclusion to only teach them hunter crap when they turned 13.
#Text=Dean had some misgivings about it.
#Text=Like if they had gotten hurt by one of their enemies while they were away on a grocery run or a small local case in Lawrence, what would they do?
#Text=Bringing them along could only bring more risk but staying back was equally as risky.
#Text=So he taught Maddie self defense.
#Text=He taught her how to throw a good punch, land a good kick and possibly knock someone out.
#Text=He had even given her strict warning to save it, and I quote, "for the idiotic monsters."
#Text=So they did.
#Text=They taught the siblings everything they knew when they turned 13, or at least when Buck did.
#Text=They were freaked out at first but thankfully they didn't have any nightmares.
#Text=The freak outs, the screams of horror soon turn into big smiles and chorus of laughter.
#Text=Dean felt like a proud mom of a kid who had just met a big achievement in their life.
#Text=Fast forward a few years and a high school diploma, the quartet which now consists of Sam, Dean, Buck and a trenchcoat wearing angel called Castiel.
#Text=Maddie was long gone, now probably off in Pennsylvania with Doug doing god know what.
#Text=He had just turned 18 and was now achieving a milestone.
#Text=Kicking the devil's ass.
#Text=Who would've thought they would grow up with the scariest hunters alive and an angel who could blow your brains out with just a snap of its fingers.
#Text=It ended horribly, with Sam thrown into the cage alongside Lucifer and Micheal.
#Text=With Dean running off to Lisa's and started his apple pie life.
#Text=Castiel had gone off world, presumably back to heaven.
#Text=So Buck went to enlist for the Navy SEALs.
#Text=It went smoothly, as least for Buck.
#Text=He kicked the physical aspect in its ass but couldn't handle the mental part.
#Text=He couldn't just flip the switch on his emotions, he wasn't like they.
#Text=So he quit and went back to Lawrence.
#Text=Just in time for the Leviathans.
#Text=And Sam almost dying trying to close the gates of hell.
#Text=Then a knight of hell rises and Dean stupidly make a decision and got the mark of cain which bit them in their asses a year later when they unleashed the darkness.
#Text=Then they met god who help them defeat the darkness well kinda.
#Text=It was like family therapy for god and his sister.
#Text=And then he had enough.
#Text=He saw an escape.
#Text=His escape to his normal life when he saved a guy who was shot in his leg and Sam joked about him being a paramedic.
#Text=He spent nights planning his escape and how he'll confront the brothers about it.
#Text=He already told Castiel, who was very supportive of his actions, telling him to take it.
#Text=So he did.
#Text=He packed up and left after telling the brothers the night before.
#Text=He was thankful that they were supportive but still upset that he was leaving.
#Text=He hated to leave them too but he needed to.
#Text=He was sick of this life.
#Text=Now in sunny Los Angeles, he started to train become a member of the LAFD.
#Text=Sure they'll be some demons and whatever else popping by and being shocked that he was now a firefighter and no longer hunting.
#Text=But some still refuse to leave him be and basically bullied him by taunting him and moving things around.
#Text=So he killed them, or exorcised them.
#Text=A few years later, everything was going smooth.
#Text=No more visits from monster, a stable income and home, a loving family.
#Text=He had everything he wanted and he still kept in touch with he brother and their angel and their pseudo-kid who was biologically the devil's child.
#Text=Then everything went horribly wrong.
#Text=The blissful life lasted only a few months when a ladder truck crushed him, basically ruining his life and his connection with his family and most importantly Eddie.
#Text=Eddie was his rock for the whole time he was in and out of the hospital taking test and going through physical rehabilitation and much more.
#Text=But after the embolism and the tsunami, Eddie was growing distant.
#Text=Buck had thought Eddie didn't trust him with Christopher anymore and that's why he hadn't seen the kid.
#Text=But no, Eddie was instead street-fighting illegally.
#Text=Long story short, Buck finds out.
#Text=Him and Eddie got into a major argument.
#Text=Their friendship was gone.
#Text=Buck had gone to Athena.
#Text=Bobby just had to tell him that he was the reason Buck couldn't come back to work.
#Text=And that was the last straw for Buck.
#Text=He couldn't take it anymore so he did what he did the same to the Brother's years back, he left.
#Text=Now instead of going to some where new, he went to a place he knew from heart.
#Text=That was Lawrence, Kansas.
#Text=·_·
#Text="So yeah.
#Text=Chim finally say.
#Text="So how did your parents die?"
#Text=Hen ask, earning herself a slap from Athena.
#Text="We were told demons did it.
#Text=Athena ask.
#Text="Nope."
#Text=Buck replied.
#Text="We didn't think it was a big deal."
#Text=Maddie shrugs.
#Text="But it is now."
#Text=Dean came in the room which a concerned look which was mixed with anxiety.
#Text="Jack and Eileen are missing."
#Text=Chapter End Notes
#Text=Ok it's now April 3rd...

#Text="
#Text=if you said goodbye to me tonight.."
#Text=ow.
#Text=My head was spinning, probably like a teacup at one of those carnival games that is being rode by a bunch of kids.
#Text=I tear my eyes open and was greeted to my legs tied up with chains.
#Text=The floor was dirty with smudges of blood and dirt covering the original flooring.
#Text=I lift my head up and looked around the dimly lit room.
#Text=Infront of me was a table and a old rusty radio that sat atop of said table.
#Text=It was playing an old song which I knew from my childhood.
#Text=My mom, she loved this song.
#Text=If was by Billy Joel but I couldn't remember the title.
#Text="Buck?"
#Text=Eddie was there.
#Text=His hand were chained up above him, his legs dangling free.
#Text=His face was bloody and bruised.
#Text=Mine couldn't be any better.
#Text=Why did they have to come find me?
#Text=This was a horrible idea from the get-go.
#Text="Eds?"
#Text=My eyes grew soft as I let the nickname slip.
#Text=The part of his arm were red and bruised where the chains were and his hand had lost its colour, presumably from the restricted blood flow.
#Text=His eyelids were swollen, most likely from a nasty punch.
#Text="You ok?"
#Text=I felt obligated to ask this.
#Text=As I did land them in this mess.
#Text=If I hadn't left L.A and got back to hunting, they wouldn't have gotten hurt or possibly dead.
#Text=The monsters had a good deal with us Buckleys.
#Text=They wouldn't bother us if we didn't bother them but I had to go chop on of their friends head off.
#Text=To be fair, Jordan Ricci is a major dick.
#Text=I mean, sucking blood from little children and infants?
#Text=Who does that?
#Text=Eddie let out a dry laugh, the sides of his eyes crinkling up as he laughs."
#Text=I said defensively.
#Text=Why would I be friends with mon-oh.
#Text=Crowley and Rowena.
#Text=I mean, they're good monsters.
#Text="Did he wear a full black suit and his eyes go red?
#Text=Eddie scoffs.
#Text=I bow my head in embarrassment.
#Text="Yeah.
#Text=He laughs before wincing.
#Text="You're wrong.
#Text=I greeted, straighting my posture.
#Text=I couldn't let him know I'm weak.
#Text=He'll use that to his advantage.
#Text="Evan.
#Text=Anger filled my body.
#Text=I can't believe him right now.
#Text=A demon who me and the brothers had grown to tolerate and possibly treat as family was now defending some horrible vampires?
#Text="Just be glad that my mother likes you."
#Text=Crowley huffed before walking away, probably to torture my friends.
#Text="Ok we don't have a lot of time we need to get out of here."
#Text=I state.
#Text=They desperately need to get out.
#Text="Just so you know.
#Text=I have no time and energy for this.
#Text=There has to be a key, a pin something somewhere to pick these locks.
#Text=Oh thank god, I can stand.
#Text=I'm hunched over in a uncomfortable posture thanks to the chair.
#Text=I ignored the discomfort and started to walk around the tiny room, in search for a tool.
#Text=Aha!
#Text=I slide it around my arm and down to my palms behind my back.
#Text=I use my fingers to grasp hold of it and stated to fiddle around with it.
#Text=CLICK!
#Text=The chains came rattling off.
#Text=I bend down to do the same thing with my legs but easier.
#Text="Alright now hurry up."
#Text=Eddie mumbled.
#Text=Glad he was still awake.
#Text=I rolled my eyes before moving over to him.
#Text=I give him a glance over and undid his chains.
#Text=He drops to the floor into a coughing fit.
#Text=I kneeled beside him and patted him on his back like a mother would.
#Text="You ok?"
#Text=I ask.
#Text=Well I felt obligated too.
#Text="Yeah."
#Text=He winces as he stands.
#Text=Ouch, there must be some nasty bruises under his white shirt.
#Text=·_·
#Text="Hello?"
#Text=I said, my voice echoing off the walls as I opened a door.
#Text="Oh Buck!"
#Text=A childlike voice exclaimed.
#Text="Jack?"
#Text=I ask into th darkness as i moved toward the middle of the room.
#Text=There's a lightbulb hanging over them with a hanging switch.
#Text=I pulled the switch and it helped our vision.
#Text=It wasn't a very bright light but it'll make do.
#Text="They used enochian chains on me.
#Text=I muttered, kneeling down behind him and repeated the movement I did with mine and Eddie's chains.
